  "data": "graph TD
    Start([START]) --> Step1[/Step 1: User Selects Symptom Checkboxes/]

    API1 --> Step2[/Step 2: Display Diagnoses Cards with Match %/]
    Step2 --> Click[User Clicks/Selects One Specific Diagnosis]

    API2 --> Step3[/Step 3: Display Personal Ingredients & Recipes Cards/]
    Step3 --> End([END])

    style Start fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style End fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style Step1 fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px
    style Step2 fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px
    style Step3 fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px

}
